subcodes.first_line: The Truth, exalted be His glory, calleth the peoples of the world unto life everlasting, while His servants remain enslaved by vain imaginings and idle fancies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله اهل عالم را بحیات دائمه میخواند ولکن عباد او را بظنون و اوهام
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
